headerDisplay: Homebridge 2.0 plugin for Big Ass Fans (i6, es6, Haiku H/I, Haiku L)
footerDisplay: For details, see the [README](https://github.com/applemanj/homebridge2-bigAssFans#readme). Whoosh is now native SwingMode in the fan tile. Fan Auto is now native in the fan tile via TargetFanState.

ip.title: Fan IP address or hostname
ip.description: The IP address or hostname of the fan (supports mDNS hostnames).

mac.title: MAC address
mac.description: The MAC address of the fan.

showFanAutoSwitch.title: Fan Auto Switch (legacy)
showFanAutoSwitch.description: Add a separate switch for 'Fan Auto' (also available natively in fan tile).

showDimToWarmSwitch.title: Dim to Warm Switch
showDimToWarmSwitch.description: Add a switch for 'Dim to Warm'

condition.functionBody: return model.fans[arrayIndices].fanModel !== 'Haiku L Series' && model.fans[arrayIndices].fanModel !== 'Haiku H/I Series';

disableDirectionControl.title: Disable Direction Control
disableDirectionControl.description: Prevents user from changing fan direction from HomeKit.
